translations.tr: Rahmân ve Rahîm olan Allah'ın adıyla.
translations.en: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
All praise is due to Allah, Lord of the worlds.
The Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
Master of the Day of Judgment.

translations.tr: Yalnız sana kulluk eder, yalnız senden yardım dileriz.
translations.en: You alone we worship, and You alone we ask for help.
Guide us to the straight path.

arabic: صِرَاطَ الَّذِينَ أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَيْهِمْ غَيْرِ الْمَغْضُوبِ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلَا الضَّالِّينَ
transliteration: Sıratallezine en'amte aleyhim gayril magdubi aleyhim ve lad dallin

translations.tr: Kendilerine nimet verdiklerinin yoluna; gazaba uğrayanların ve sapkınların yoluna değil.
translations.en: The path of those You have blessed, not of those who earned anger or went astray.
